competitive_traits: Driven by measurable improvement — in systems, in processes, and in personal execution
Approaches technical challenges with the same mindset as competitive performance: study the system, find the inefficiency, optimize it
Sets specific targets and tracks progress — vague goals don't motivate me, measured outcomes do
risk_profile: Calculated and architecture-first. Before recommending or implementing any change to a system, I map the dependencies and downstream effects. AI implementation especially requires this discipline — knowing what breaks when a model behaves unexpectedly is as important as knowing what it can do.
growth_orientation: Actively building AI and systems architecture depth through hands-on implementation. I learn by building real things — RAG pipelines, automation scripts, full-stack systems — not just reading about them. Each project is a test of whether my mental model of a system is actually correct.
